title: Novel rapid-deposition thin-film forming compositions as effective wound care treatment
abstract: The present invention provides thin-film forming compositions comprising an antiseptic (e.g., povidone iodine, chlorhexidine, or octenidine), a non-aqueous solvent, and a film-forming material dissolved in the non-aqueous solvent, wherein the composition yields a continuous and flexible protective film upon substantial removal of the solvent. The compositions are useful for the treatment and prevention of infections in wounds, ulcers (e.g., decubitus ulcers and stasis ulcers), cuts, or burns, or against infections from bacterial, mycobacterial, viral, fungal, or amoeba causes, as well as for prevention of such infections in appropriate clinical settings (e.g., as liquid bandages or dressings). Additionally, the compositions of this invention are also useful for the treatment of infections and as a disinfectant skin preparation for pre- and/or post-surgical operations.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A thin-film forming composition comprising an antiseptic, a non-aqueous solvent, and a film-forming material dissolved in the non-aqueous solvent, wherein the composition yields a continuous and flexible protective film upon substantial removal of the solvent. 2. The thin-film forming composition of claim 1, wherein the antiseptic comprises povidone iodine (PVP-I), chlorhexidine, or octenidine. 3. The thin-film forming composition of claim 1 or 2, wherein the antiseptic is contained in the composition at a concentration between 0.01% and 10%, between 0.1% and 2.5%, between 0.1% and 2.0%, or between 0.5% and 2.0% (weight/weight or weight/volume). 4. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1 to 3, wherein chlorhexidine is chlorhexidine digluconate, or octenidine is octenidine dihydrochloride. 5. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1 to 4, wherein the film-forming material comprises polyvinylbutyral (PVB), a vinylpyrrolidone and vinyl acetate copolymer, polyvinylpyrrolidone, ethyl cellulose, nitrocellulose, poly(methylacrylate- isobutene-monoisopropylmaleate), acrylate polymer, or polysiloxane. 6. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1 to 5, wherein the film-forming material comprises polyvinylbutyral (PVB). 7. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1 to 6, wherein the film-forming material is contained in the composition at a concentration between 1% and 20%, or between 5% and 10% (weight/weight or weight/volume). 8. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1 to 7, further comprising ethanol, propanol, isopropanol, isopentane, ethyl acetate, acetone, or a combination thereof. 9. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1-8, further comprising a cooling agent, a lubricant, an antimicrobial preservative, a co-solvent, a surfactant, a viscosity agent, or a bioadhesive agent. 10. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the cooling agent comprises camphor, borneol, menthol, methone glycerin acetyl ester, methone glycerin ester, methone glycerin carboxamide, methane glycerol ketal, alkyl-substituted urea, sulfonamide, terpene analog, furanone, or phosphine oxide. 11. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the cooling agent comprises menthol or camphor. 12. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the lubricant comprises propylene glycol, glycerin, propylene glycol, blended polyvinyl alcohol, polyvinyl alcohol, polyethylene glycol 400, light mineral oil, castor oil, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, hypromellose, Carbopol 980, white petrolatum, soy lecithin, sodium carboxyl methylcellulose, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose, hypromellose, or a combination thereof. 13. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the antimicrobial preservative comprises benzalkonium chloride, thimerosal, chlorobutanol, methyl paraben, propyl paraben, phenylethyl alcohol, EDTA, sorbic acid, Onamer M, or a combination thereof. 14. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9 or 13, wherein the antimicrobial preservative is contained in the composition at a concentration between 0.001% and 1.0% (weight/weight or weight/volume). 15. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the co-solvent or surfactant comprises polysorbate 20, polysorbate 60, polysorbate 80, a polyoxyethylene surfactant, a polyoxypropylene surfactant, cyclodextrin, tyloxapol, or a combination thereof. 16. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9 or 15, wherein the co-solvent or surfactant is contained in the composition at a level from 0.01% to 2% (weight/weight or weight/volume). 17. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the viscosity builder agent comprises polyvinyl alcohol, polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP), methyl cellulose, hydroxypropylmethylcellulose, hydroxyethylcellulose, carboxymethylcellulose, hydroxypropylcellulose, or hyaluronic acid. 18. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9 or 17, wherein the viscosity builder agent is contained in the composition at a level of from 0.01% to 2% (weight/weight or weight/volume). 19. The thin-film forming composition of claim 9, wherein the bio-adhesive agent comprises PVP, xanthan gum, locust bean gum, acacia gum, hydroxypropyl methylcellulose (HPMC), sodium alginate, pectin, gelatin, carbomer, polyvinylalcohol, gellan gum, tragacanth, acacia, or sodium carboxymethyl cellulose. 20. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 2 to 19, wherein the composition comprises PVP-I or chlorhexidine or octenidine at a concentration of 0.5% to 2.5%, PVB at a concentration of 5% to 10%, ethanol at a concentration of 50% to 60% or 

 isopropanol at a concentration of 50% to 70%, and/or ethyl acetate at a concentration of 8% to 10%. 21. The thin-film forming composition of claim 20, further comprising acetone at a concentration of 20% to 25%, or castor oil at a concentration of 0.1% to 1%, or camphor at a concentration of 1% to 2%. 22. The thin-film forming composition of any of claims 1 to 21, further comprising sugar, or potassium lodate, or potassium iodide, or a local anesthetic, or a topical skin adhesive, or a combination thereof. 23. The thin-film forming composition of claim 22, wherein the topical skin adhesive comprises cyanoacrylate or a derivative thereof.
